(Rose, blood decorations etc.) 100 Credits/100 coins Making an outfit --> 350 Credits/350 coins Making a full skin --> 500 Credits/500 coins Prices may also change depending on the skin Rules are simple I'll start on the skin whenever i want and cant give you an exact time because of life issues, dont worry! It wont take long, you'll give me an example/explanation of the skin, I'll make the skin and ask you a few questions. After the skin is done, I'll let you see the skin, you'll tell me if it needs more work or not.
